_comment: Maps a corpus-locator base (everything before the ':passage' suffix) to an Archive text id. The text id is the filename stem of an .md file in workspace-hub/archive/texts/, the same value that archive/entity.html accepts as its ?id= query parameter. graph.js looks up each node's locators against this table; the first match wins, the rest are ignored. Unmapped locators stay as quiet uninteractive text — never as broken links. To extend, add high-confidence pairs here. Avoid mapping a corpus base to a text that is merely 'thematically close'; honest gaps are better than misleading links.
